case_title: MAUREEN G. URIBE AS TRUSTEE OF THE MAUREEN G. et al VS. HO LEE YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAUREEN G. URIBE AS TRUSTEE OF THE MAUREEN G. URIBE TRUST CAROLAN, JAMES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CAROLAN FAMILY TRUST CAROLAN, HELEN AS TRUSTEES OF THE CAROLAN FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, HO LEE MRS. HO LEE YOUNG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 490 31ST AVENUE, #104, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94121, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, HO LEE MRS. HO LEE YOUNG
